node.title: Uber SWE Intern Second interview. (USA - Phone interview)

topic.title: Uber SWE Intern Second interview. (USA - Phone interview)

post.content:
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/52238335/split-text-message-into-chunks-of-30-chars-limit-with-suffixed-k-n

I did not think about the case when the suffix goes over a fixed length and solved the question. The interviewer pointed this out with 10 minutes left in the interview and asked me to proceed assuming k and n are less than 10.
Got a reject in a week.
